name: Chat History (Supabase)
description: Persists all messages to Supabase and serves a real-time chat monitoring UI at /conversations.

supabaseServiceKey.description: Supabase service role key — used for server-side inserts and updates

supabaseAnonKey.description: Supabase anon key — used in the browser UI for Realtime subscriptions. Falls back to service key if not set (local use only).
